failures.baseline: Session routing accepts fuzzy project identifiers and can fall back when only one unrelated Editor is online.
Context scope is not applied as a hard filter before search and ranking.
Unknown operations produce warning diagnostics and Preview can still offer an Apply next action.
Apply exposes a save capability switch but returns saved=false without touched-only package persistence.
Generic validation loads all affected assets as UBlueprint and cannot validate non-Blueprint targets by type.
